description: Committed treatment-safe Card Rush manual publish coverage set for broader live pricing verification.

assumptions: Review reconciliation against an environment where the listed card/day coverage keys are intentionally published for this rollout.

Unexpected pre-existing card_rush canonical or published rows for the same variant/source_day_jst/pricing_basis keys should be treated as rollout noise and investigated before calling coverage healthy.

coverage.notes: Same-day competing eligible conditions prove the best ungraded condition selection rule.
Second JST day for multi-day published history on the same treatment-safe default variant.
Additional treatment-safe default card with live published coverage.
Intentional empty-history card-day to keep no-qualifying reader behavior in scope.
